title: AutoPaste
description: Allows you to paste colored (and actually any) text into a book with a keybinding.
body:
This mod allows you to paste colored (and actually any) text into a book with a new keybinding.

First, write ```%s%``` anywhere in the book, then you can press <kbd>X</kbd> to replace frist entry with your clipboard content or you can press <kbd>Shift</kbd>+<kbd>X</kbd> to replace all entries.

---
for bug report or for feature request dm ```sergey5588```(me) in discord.
